title: Glitches since new rollout
excerpt: Since the new Monday update went live today, July 3, any new accounts that I create or new contacts that I create is deleted from the active deal it is linked to. Everything that was IN my CRM’s Deal / Contacts / Account…

posts.author: TSkochil (Tracy)
posts.cookedHtml:
Since the new Monday update went live today, July 3, any new accounts that I create or new contacts that I create is deleted from the active deal it is linked to. Everything that was IN my CRM’s Deal / Contacts / Accounts boards prior to the update is still there. Attempting to create anything new isn’t working.

Is anyone else running into this type of glitch?
